compressed_context:
DEF: COMMUNITY-IMPLEMENTATION-COMMITTEE(CIC)
CTX: HAKU-WI/NOA-JAYATAI PROJECT
FIELD-SUMMARY: HOUSING ∧ FINANCIAL-CAPACITY ∧ INCLUSIVE-RURAL-BUSINESS
FIELD: HOUSING SKILLS:
  DIETS(HEALTHY) ∧ STOVES(IMPROVED) ∧ PRACTICES(HEALTHY)
  ∧ HOME-ORG ∧ WATER(SAFE) ∧ WASTE-MGMT(SOLID)
FIELD: FINANCIAL-CAPACITY:
  RECORD-KEEPING ∧ FIN-MGMT(IMPROVED) ∧ SAVINGS
FIELD: INCLUSIVE-RURAL-BUSINESS:
  ORG-BIZ-DEV ∧ BIZ-PLAN-PREP
  ∧ GRANT-PARTICIPATION(GOVT-PROGRAMMES)
  ∧ BUSINESS-BEHAVIOUR(DEVELOP)

OUTPUT1: TECH-AG-SKILLS:
  IRRIGATION-INSTALL[SYSTEM:SPRINKLER,DRIP] ∧ WATER-HARVEST
  ∧ CROP-INSTALL/MAINTAIN(PERMANENT,SEASONAL)
  ∧ GARDEN/GREENHOUSE-INSTALL ∧ PASTURE-MGMT
  ∧ SMALL-ANIMAL-REARING ∧ AGROFORESTRY-INSTALL/MAINTAIN
  ∧ ORGANIC-FERTILIZER(PRODUCE) ∧ AQUACULTURE(DEVELOP)
  ∧ NATIVE-VARIETY-CONSERVATION
OUTPUT2: LIVELIHOOD-SKILLS:
  DIETS(HEALTHY) ∧ STOVES(IMPROVED-INSTALL/USE)
  ∧ PRACTICES(HEALTHY) ∧ HOME-ORG(IMPROVED)
  ∧ WATER(SAFE-SOURCE) ∧ WASTE-MGMT(SOLID)
  ∧ HOUSEHOLD-ACTIVITY-ORG(TIME-SAVE)
OUTPUT3: FINANCIAL-SKILLS:
  RECORD-KEEPING ∧ FIN-MGMT ∧ SAVINGS
OUTPUT4: BUSINESS-DEV-SKILLS:
  FUNDING-APPLICATION(WHERE/HOW) ∧ BIZ-PLAN(PREP)
  ∧ PRODUCT-BRANDING ∧ PACKAGING-USE ∧ FOOD-SAFETY
  ∧ CRAFT-DEV-FOR-SALE

NOTE: SKILL-FIELDS ≠ MODULE3 CATEGORIES
  ∵ HAKU-WI/NOA-JAYATAI HOLISTIC-INCLUDE
  LIVELIHOOD/HOUSEHOLD-SKILLS

CTX: TARGETING
STEP1: VILLAGE-CRITERIA:
  POVERTY>40%@2013-DISTRICT-POVERTY-MAP
  ∧ AG-REG-AREA@2012-CENSUS LAND≈1.3ha
  ∧ POPULATION: INDIGENOUS-PEOPLES
RESULT: 11,191 VILLAGES ∧ 533,962 HOUSEHOLDS (≈40% SUBSISTENCE)
STEP2: VILLAGE-ALLOCATION-ANNUAL:
  FONCODES ALLOCATES BY REGION-BUDGET
  ∧ SYNERGY(PREVIOUS,NEW-VILLAGES)
  ∧ DIALOGUE(MUNICIPALITIES ∧ NGOS)
STEP3: HOUSEHOLD-SELECTION:
  CIC+COMMUNITY-ASSEMBLY SELECT VIA PARTICIPATORY-DIAGNOSTIC

CTX: COVERAGE:
  NATIONWIDE ∧ FOCUS: HIGHLANDS ∧ AMAZON
NOTE: NO DIRECT WOMEN/YOUTH TARGETING
  ∴ AD-HOC STRATEGIES ↑ PARTICIPATION

CTX: DELIVERY-ORGANIZATION
COMMUNITY-PARTICIPATION:
  FONCODES-TEAMS VISIT VILLAGES ∧ MEET(LEADERS,MAYOR)
  ∧ SECURE AGREEMENT
AGREEMENT: SIGNED AMONG FONCODES ∧ COMMUNITY ∧ MUNICIPALITY

CTX: CIC
STRUCTURE:
  ~100 HOUSEHOLDS/CIC
  ∧ BOARD: PRESIDENT ∧ TREASURER ∧ SECRETARY
  ∧ MUNICIPALITY-DESIGNATED-MEMBER
FUNCTIONS:
  DESIGN/IMPLEMENT PROJECTS
  ∧ REGISTER@NATIONAL-REGISTRATION-SYSTEM
    (LEGAL-FUND-RESPONSIBILITY)
  ∧ APPOINT MANAGER→LEAD ACTIVITIES
TRAINING:
  FONCODES PROVIDES ACCOUNTING ∧ MGMT TRAINING
  ∵ BOARD LEGALLY-RESPONSIBLE ∧ NEED PROCUREMENT-KNOWLEDGE

CTX: PARTICIPATORY-DIAGNOSTIC
  FIRST CIC ACTIVITY ∧ ALL MEMBERS IDENTIFY
  AGRIC/MARKET-ACCESS PROBLEMS

CTX: PROJECT-DESIGN
  CIC-MANAGER USES MENU(PRESELECTED-ACTIVITIES)
  TO DESIGN PROJECT
  ∧ CIC APPROVAL REQUIRED
  ∧ PROJECT-DOC OUTLINES ACTIVITIES
    ∧ FUNDING-NEED@FONCODES

CTX: IMPLEMENTATION
  PROJECTS RUN FIRST 2 YEARS

CTX: YACHACHIQ
ROLE:
  LOCAL-PROMOTERS HIRED BY CIC
  ∧ PROVIDE TECHNICAL-ASSISTANCE
    ∧ TRAINING(AGRIC ∧ HOUSEHOLD-MGMT)
  ∧ TRAINED BY FONCODES-TECHNICIANS
  ∧ FROM SAME/NEARBY COMMUNITIES ∧ LANGUAGE-MATCH
COMPENSATION:
  SALARY=USD428/MO + TRANSPORT + PER-DIEM@TRAVEL
NOTE: YACHACHIQ BASIS OF PROGRAMME-ORGANIZATION
  ∧ MUST BUILD TRUST AMONG PARTICIPANTS
